title: cow mod
body:
this mod adds stuff related to cows. including:
- cow block  
- cow log  
- cow biome  
- cow dimension    
- cow portal igniter  
- cow ingot  
- cow armor  
- cow pee  
- cow ore  
 
What do these blocks and items do?
- cow biome - its a biome including most things listed above
- cow block - its basically useless grass
- cow log - its only use currently is to make a portal in the shape of a nether portal
- cow portal igniter - its currently uncraftable, but its use is to light the cow portal
- cow dimension - a very cursed dimension
- cow pee - the liquid for the cow dimension
- cow ingot - its for crafting cow armor
- cow ore - break this block to obtain cow ingot

Any problems? Join the Discord!

This mod was made with MCreator
